description_long: This ottoman features a square, box-like structure with a wide, flared base and a slightly tapered upper section. The exterior is adorned with intricate geometric and floral carvings, giving it a traditional, handcrafted appearance. The surface is primarily dark brown with lighter, almost golden highlights, and the interior is divided into two compartments, suggesting a dual-purpose design. The base is decorated with repeating star motifs and bordered patterns, while the upper section displays interwoven diamond and line designs. The finish appears matte and slightly rough, with visible wear that adds to its antique character. The object is likely made of wood, possibly with a lacquer or paint finish, and the interior is unupholstered, revealing a rawer, lighter material.
description: A square, ornately carved ottoman with a flared base, geometric and floral patterns, and a dual-compartment interior. The finish is matte and dark brown with golden highlights, giving it an antique, handcrafted look.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the detailed geometric carvings and star motifs on the base, with the dual-compartment interior visible.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the intricate patterns and the clear division of the interior into two sections.
description_view_2: Rear-left view emphasizing the depth of the carvings and the symmetry of the decorative motifs.
description_view_3: Back view showing the continuous carved patterns and the slightly worn, matte finish on the surface.
attribute_leg_design: no visible legs; flared, solid base with carved skirt
